chunks.title: Covenant with Eyes and Adultery
chunks.reason: Job declares his sexual purity and the consequences of lust.

chunks.title: Justice for Slaves and the Poor
chunks.reason: Job defends his fair treatment of servants and care for the needy.

chunks.title: Purity from Wealth and Pride
chunks.reason: Job rejects idolatry of gold, sun, moon, and secret sin.

chunks.title: Purity from Land Exploitation
chunks.reason: Job concludes his oath by denying exploitation of the land.
